response: Taylor Swift’s pop/synth-pop album *Midnights*, released in October 2022, features 13 tracks with a total duration of 44 minutes and debuted to 1.58 million in first-week sales, marking a standout commercial launch. The album has since amassed 3.4 billion Spotify streams and won the Grammy Award for Album of the Year, cementing its status as both a commercial juggernaut and critical success.
